shortDescription: UKVI · Post-study work · 2–3 years · UK degree required

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Graduate Route fee (£822) and IHS on gov.uk. Must apply before student visa expires.

alert.title: Apply before visa expiry
alert.body: Graduate Route must be applied from within UK while Student visa still valid. Missing deadline loses eligibility.

about.label: Description
about.value: Post-study work visa for international graduates who completed eligible UK degree. Allows 2 years work (3 years for PhD) at any skill level without sponsor.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Completed eligible UK degree at licensed sponsor · Valid Student visa at application · Applied before Student visa expires · Studied in UK minimum period

about.label: One-time route
about.value: Graduate Route cannot be extended beyond initial grant. Plan Skilled Worker or other route before expiry.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Work freely in UK. Transition to Skilled Worker or other visa before Graduate Route expires.

redFlagsBanner: If Student visa expiring soon, prioritise Graduate Route application immediately—no in-country application after expiry.

redFlags.title: Applied after Student visa expired
redFlags.fix: Apply before expiry; track visa end date from day one

redFlags.title: Degree not eligible
redFlags.description: Course or institution not eligible for Graduate Route.
redFlags.fix: Verify eligibility at enrolment—not at graduation

redFlags.title: Insufficient UK study period
redFlags.description: Did not complete required time physically in UK.
redFlags.fix: Verify attendance and UK study duration requirements

redFlags.title: University confirmation delay
redFlags.description: UKVI waiting for university to confirm completion.
redFlags.fix: Follow up with university registry early

redFlags.title: IHS not paid
redFlags.fix: Pay IHS via gov.uk before submit

redFlags.title: Passport expiring soon
redFlags.description: Short passport limits visa grant length.
redFlags.fix: Renew passport before application if needed

faqs.q: Can we guarantee Graduate Route approval?
faqs.a: No. Most eligible graduates are approved but we never guarantee.
2 years (3 years for PhD graduates)—verify current rules.
No. Must apply from within UK on valid Student visa.
Yes—open work at any skill level during Graduate Route.
Generally no extension—plan next visa before expiry.
Common transition—need job offer from licensed sponsor before Graduate Route ends.
Dependants who were on Student visa as dependants may extend—verify rules.
After degree completion confirmed; before Student visa expires.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Track Student visa expiry from enrolment
Apply as soon as completion confirmed
Plan Skilled Worker timeline 6 months before Graduate Route expiry
postApproval: Send Graduate Route grant and expiry
Plan next visa route before expiry
Guide on NI number if not already obtained

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial UK Graduate Route counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Set calendar alert 90 days before Student visa expiry for every UK graduate client.

quiz.question: Graduate Route applied from:
options: Within UK on valid Student visa

quiz.question: Work restrictions:
options: Open work at any skill level

dos: Plan Skilled Worker before Graduate Route ends
donts: Do not apply from outside UK
mistakes: Applied day after Student visa expired
Degree course not Graduate Route eligible
No plan for visa after 2 years

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample completion / graduation letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Confirms program completion date for PGWP / 485 / Graduate Route.

sampleDocs.title: Sample final transcript (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Official transcript with degree conferred date.

sampleDocs.title: Sample study permit / visa copy (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Prior student visa evidence required for post-study pathways.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.
